stemHtml:
Choose the combination of correct statements regarding the Accelerate-Stopping Distance Available (ASDA):

1. The ASDA includes the TORA
2. The ASDA includes the starter extension (if available)
3. The ASDA includes the stopway in the direction of take-off (if available)
4. The ASDA includes the stopways in both directions (if available)
5. The ASDA includes the length of the clearway
6. The ASDA does not include the length of the clearway
7. The ASDA includes the TODA
